lines: Munezero, Munezero,Birori bishimisha ! Mu ndirimbo zo mw ijuru, Dushyiremo n'izacu Yesu yaje kudukiza,Tumuhawe n'Uwiteka : Munezero, Munezero, Birori bishimisha !
Munezero, Munezero,Imitim’ inezerwe ! Tumwitabe, tumwitabe,Yes’aduhamagara Dukunze kw’ aturokora,Tureke kubirazika : Munezero, Munezero, Imitim’inezerwe!
Munezero, Munezero,Jyan’ ishimwe ku mana! Amahoro n'amahoro Ni ko
Intumwa zivuga. Yesu ni w' uhira bose :twese tumuririmbire : Munezero,Munezero, Jyan’ ishimwe ku Mana !
